title: Eva Plot Holes
wikitext:
[]: Eva Plot Holes             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Oct 12, 2004 3:35 pm Everytime I watch Eva I seem to find another plot hole and it got me thinking, just how many plot holes are there in the series? So lets start a list. I will start with the best and most infamous one- the empty plugsuit in the plug while Shinji is inside the Eva (I still can't figure out how Anno/Gainax missed that one). What are some other ones that you guys/gals have noticed.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Oct 12, 2004 4:00 pm what do you mean pot-holes(thats a funny word j/k) I need Pics

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Oct 12, 2004 4:29 pm God damnit Hunter, that isn't a plot hole! Ritsuko explains it, and that is more than enough for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Tue Oct 12, 2004 4:36 pm Now, now, Dave...don't be so hasty to judge... Hunter21, are you refering to the scenes in episode 21 when Shinji is absorbed by Unit-01? If so, that's not a plot hole. Shinji's physical form was...well, liquified into the LCL, leaving his plugsuit adrift in the goo. If not... :shock: which scene was that? I wanna see! I wanna see! I wanna know! I wanna find out! Kakashi Sensei's true face! Gomen, I like Naruto too much.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Oct 12, 2004 5:20 pm Episode 20 has no plot holes, it has a plot MISTAKE !!!! Shinji was in civilian clothes in episode 19, but when he was absorbed by the eva, the clothing was changed by the plug suit. It's a mistake, accept it. THey put the line of Ritsuko just to fix the mistake. And also that line gave a cool answer to explain where the hell Asuka get those bandages in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Oct 12, 2004 5:33 pm What was Ritsukos explanition to it??

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Oct 12, 2004 6:06 pm Plot holes is just a nice way of saying that the writters/animators made a mistake. So plot hole=plot mistake. And if you didn't think I accepted that Eva had a fair share of holes/mistakes do you think I would have started this post? Now get to pointing some more out that I don't know about yet so I can laugh at them when I see them.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Oct 12, 2004 6:09 pm oh how bout the intry plug thing where in the differnt stills the intry plugs look bigger/smaller in the evas hands?

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Tue Oct 12, 2004 6:35 pm oh how bout the intry plug thing where in the differnt stills the intry plugs look bigger/smaller in the evas hands?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Oct 12, 2004 6:39 pm i think it could be true tho

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Oct 12, 2004 6:59 pm Nephilim wrote: Episode 20 has no plot holes, it has a plot MISTAKE !!!! Shinji was in civilian clothes in episode 19, but when he was absorbed by the eva, the clothing was changed by the plug suit. It's a mistake, accept it. THey put the line of Ritsuko just to fix the mistake. And also that line gave a cool answer to explain where the hell Asuka get those bandages in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Oct 13, 2004 3:44 pm ahh okay there good lol

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 15, 2004 2:35 am I wouldn't call the episode #20 business a "plot hole" so much as a "stupid mistake". Nothing in the plot really rides on the error, after all. As far as other plot holes are concerned... Dunno. Some things that might scream "plot hole!" at first glance can actually be worked around, if you're creative enough.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Oct 15, 2004 10:27 am the way they covered it up with ritsuko was quite admirable...they made it actually sound plausible... and supposedly his ego boundaries were forming his self image as for Asuka i think it was that she thought that she was injured (self image) and there was damage to her nerve endings...in the world post 3I she had bandages...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 15, 2004 11:20 am sadsadshinji wrote: in the world post 3I she had bandages...

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Fri Oct 15, 2004 11:59 am Reichu wrote: sadsadshinji wrote: in the world post 3I she had bandages...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Oct 15, 2004 2:32 pm MAGI wrote: Reichu wrote: sadsadshinji wrote: in the world post 3I she had bandages...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Oct 15, 2004 2:54 pm yeah her arm was split at two...i just watched it..

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:53 pm I wonder what her body looked like after they ripped U.2 to shreads?\

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Oct 15, 2004 4:08 pm Dark FireStar wrote: I wonder what her body looked like after they ripped U.2 to shreads?\
